body_excerpt: In getSlice of WifiSlice.java, there is a possible way to connect a new WiFi network from the guest mode due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
